messages.content: The Krusader 2.0 uses the RP-06-06-08 rear motor. Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
I've created a secure order link for you. Click the link to review and complete your purchase: [Order Link](https://www.rambobikes.com/57696747655/invoices/0fba499f54154c32b83167dcaaf47901).
